name: @renxqoo/renx-code
description: Renx Code terminal AI coding assistant

scripts.publish:release: pnpm run publish:preflight && pnpm run release:prepare && bun ./scripts/publish-release.mjs
scripts.publish:release:platform: pnpm run publish:preflight && pnpm run release:prepare:platform && bun ./scripts/publish-release.mjs
scripts.publish:release:main: pnpm run publish:preflight && pnpm run release:prepare:main && bun ./scripts/publish-release.mjs
scripts.publish:fix: npm run version:fix && npm run publish:release
scripts.publish:feature: npm run version:feature && npm run publish:release
scripts.publish:breaking: npm run version:breaking && npm run publish:release
scripts.test:run:bun: bun test --no-cache --preload ./test/setup-dom.ts src/context-usage-regressions.test.ts src/components src/files src/hooks src/runtime/cli-args.test.ts src/runtime/clipboard.test.ts src/runtime/terminal-theme.test.ts src/ui
scripts.test:run:vitest: vitest run src/agent/runtime src/commands/slash-commands.test.ts src/runtime/exit.test.ts src/runtime/runtime-support.test.ts
scripts.test:run: pnpm --filter @renx-code/core build && pnpm run test:run:bun && pnpm run test:run:vitest
